title: AdsXFlow LTX-2.3 ComfyUI Worker (Q4)
description: ComfyUI-based RunPod Serverless worker for Lightricks LTX-2.3. Fully quantized stack: LTX 2.3 fp8 + Gemma 3 12B QAT-Q4 (loaded as nf4 via bitsandbytes). Slim image + lazy-download weights to /runpod-volume/models on first boot. Attach a 40 GB network volume so weights persist across cold starts. Targets 32GB+ VRAM (RTX 5000 Ada / RTX 5090 / L40S / A100 80GB); 24GB experimental.

gpuTypeIds: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
